prompt: I have some research papers in my raw/ folder that need to be added to my knowledge base wiki. There's already some content in the wiki from previous ingestion. Process any new unprocessed files. Only process raw/mem0.pdf

assertions.text: Existing wiki pages from paper 1 (LoRA, etc.) are preserved and not deleted
New pages were created for mem0-specific concepts
New pages contain [[links]] to existing wiki pages where concepts overlap
Index.md includes both old and new pages
Only mem0.pdf was processed — paper 1 was recognized as already ingested
